info-header.description:
Docker Manager — Monitor and control Docker containers.

Without an API token: uses local docker CLI directly (no Portainer needed).

With Portainer: enter host, port and API token below.
Create a token in Portainer: My Account → Access tokens → Add access token

The Environment ID can be found in Portainer under Environments.

portainer-host.tooltip: IP or hostname, e.g. 192.168.1.100 or localhost

api-key.description: API token (X-API-Key) — stored in plain text
api-key.tooltip: Portainer → My Account → Access tokens → Add access token. Note: stored unencrypted by Cinnamon settings.

endpoint-id.tooltip: Portainer environment ID for local Docker

endpoint-id-2.tooltip: Portainer environment ID for second environment (e.g. NAS)

endpoint-name-2.tooltip: Shown in the environment toggle button
